title: Requirements, ER Modeling, Functional Dependencies, and Normalization · Relational Lens: Relationship Cardinality
summary: A growing incident system repeats team and member facts, mixes multiple values per cell, and produces update anomalies. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sql relationship cardinality increment in a normalized incident-system schema defense. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model one-to-one, one-to-many, and many-to-many relationships with minimum and maximum cardinality.
Derive entities, attributes, identifiers, relationships, optionality, and business rules from stakeholder language.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

content.code:
SELECT ticket_id, status, opened_at
FROM tickets
WHERE status <> 'resolved'
ORDER BY opened_at, ticket_id;
-- Record SQLite behavior, then verify syntax and semantics against PostgreSQL 18.4.
